mapper.select:
SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVDT.PR_BUYER_CD, IVDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(IVHD.GATE_CD, 'M199', IVHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , IVHD.SIGN_STATUS , CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVDT.INV_SQ , IVGH.SEND_DATE ,(CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVGH.SEND_DATE > 0 THEN ((SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ((IVGH.SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END) AS LAPSE_DAY , IVGH.REJECT_DATE , IVGH.REJECT_RMK , IVGH.SUBJECT , POHD.SUBJECT AS PO_SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , IVHD.INV_AMT , POPY.PAY_AMT , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , IVHD.PIC_USER_NM , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.UNIT_CD , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.GR_QT AS SUM_GR_QT , IVDT.INV_QT , GRDT.GR_QT , GRDT.GR_APP_QT , POHD.CUR , IVDT.UNIT_PRC AS GR_UNIT_PRICE , GRDT.GR_ITEM_AMT , PODT.DUE_DATE , IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE , GRDT.GR_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(GRDT.GATE_CD, GRDT.GR_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS GR_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(GRDT.GATE_CD, GRDT.GR_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS GR_USER_TYPE , GRDT.GR_DATE , GRDT.GR_NUM , CASE WHEN POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS EXEC_AUTH , PODT.PR_NUM , PODT.PR_SQ , PODT.CONT_NUM , PODT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND GRDT.INV_SQ = IVDT.INV_SQ AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR PODT.PR_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('200', '400')
AND IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND (UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND (UPPER(REPLACE(PODT.ITEM_DESC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ITEM_DESC}, ' ', '')) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(PODT.ITEM_SPEC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ITEM_DESC}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{GR_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{GR_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVGH.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(PODT.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
ORDER BY IVHD.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.PO_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , PODT.PO_QT - SUM_IVDT.INV_QT AS UN_INV_QT , IVDT.INV_QT AS INV_QT , IVDT.INV_QT AS OLD_INV_QT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS INV_AMT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS OLD_INV_AMT , IVDT.VAT_AMT AS VAT_AMT , SUM_IVDT.INV_QT AS SUM_INV_QT , SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS SUM_INV_AMT , SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT AS SUM2_INV_QT , SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS SUM2_INV_AMT , PODT.PO_QT + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('200', '300') THEN 0 ELSE (IVDT.INV_QT, 0) END) - (SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS PO_RE_QT -- 납품가능수량 , PODT.ITEM_AMT + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('200', '300') THEN 0 ELSE (IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) END) - (SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS PO_RE_AMT -- 납품가능금액 , GRDT.GR_APP_QT AS GR_QT , SUM_GRDT.GR_QT AS SUM_GR_QT , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , IVDT.PURCHASE_TYPE FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND GRDT.INV_SQ = IVDT.INV_SQ AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT GRDT.GATE_CD , GRDT.BUYER_CD , GRDT.PO_NUM , GRDT.PO_SQ , SUM(GRDT.GR_QT) AS GR_QT FROM STOCGRDT GRDT WHERE GRDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND GRDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY GRDT.GATE_CD, GRDT.BUYER_CD , GRDT.PO_NUM, GRDT.PO_SQ) SUM_GRDT ON (SUM_GRDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_GRDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_GRDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_GRDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('200', '300') -- 검수요청(200), 검수완료(300) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD, IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '400') -- 작성중(100), 반송(400) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM2_IVDT ON (SUM2_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT IVGH.INV_NUM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVGH.SEND_DATE , IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , IVHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY IVGH.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPC.PY_BUYER_CD , POPC.PY_DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM ,(SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = POPC.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = POPC.PY_BUYER_CD) AS CORP_TYPE , POPC.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , POPC.RMK , IVPC.GATE_CD AS IVPC_GATE_CD , IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT ,(IVPC.AP_USER_ID, POPC.PY_USER_ID) AS PAY_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, (IVPC.AP_USER_ID, POPC.PY_USER_ID), #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_USER_NM ,(IVPC.AP_REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_REQ_DATE , IVPC.ACC_HNG_CD , IVPC.ACC_MOK_CD , IVPC.ACC_DET_CD , IVPC.ACC_GWAN_CD , POHD.PAY_TYPE , POPY.PAY_PERCENT , POPC.CONT_NUM , POPC.CONT_CNT , POPC.PR_BUYER_CD , POPC.PR_DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE AS PAY_TERMS FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND POPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPC.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPC.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPC.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPC.PO_NUM AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPC.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = POPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = POPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT SUM(INV_AMT) AS INV_AMT , SUM(PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT FROM ( SELECT (SUM(IVHD.INV_AMT), 0) AS INV_AMT , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = POPY.VENDOR_CD AND IVGH.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD) WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(IVGH.INV_NUM) FROM STOCIVGH IVGH WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM}) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE POPY.PAY_CNT END AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY POPY.PAY_CNT )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCGRDT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , GR_NUM , GR_SQ , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , DETP_CD , VENDOR_CD , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , MAKER_CD , MAKER_PART_NO , UNIT_CD , CUR , GR_QT , GR_UNIT_PRICE , GR_ITEM_AMT , GR_DATE , GR_USER_ID , PO_NUM , PO_SQ , INV_NUM , INV_SQ , GR_CREATE_TYPE , VAT_CD , GR_REMARK , PURCHASE_TYPE , GR_APP_QT ) SELECT IVHD.GATE_CD , IVHD.BUYER_CD , #{GR_NUM} , ( SELECT (MAX(GR_SQ), 0) + 1 FROM STOCGRDT WHERE GR_NUM = #{GR_NUM} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , IVHD.DEPT_CD , IVHD.VENDOR_CD , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVHD.CUR , 0 , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , 0 , #{GR_DATE} , #{ses.userId} , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.INV_NUM , IVDT.INV_SQ , 'DI' , IVHD.VAT_TYPE , '' , IVHD.PURCHASE_TYPE , #{GR_QT} FROM STOCIVHD IVHD LEFT JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVDT.INV_SQ = #{INV_SQ}
mapper.select:
SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVDT.PR_BUYER_CD, IVDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.SIGN_STATUS IN ('T', 'P', 'R', 'C') THEN GETCOMCODE(IVHD.GATE_CD, 'M020', IVHD.SIGN_STATUS, 0, 'KO') ELSE GETCOMCODE(IVHD.GATE_CD, 'M199', IVHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, 'KO') END) AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , IVHD.SIGN_STATUS , CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVDT.INV_SQ , IVGH.SEND_DATE , CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVGH.SEND_DATE > 0 THEN ((SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ((IVGH.SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END AS LAPSE_DAY , IVGH.REJECT_DATE , IVGH.REJECT_RMK , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , IVHD.INV_AMT , POPY.PAY_AMT , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , IVHD.PIC_USER_NM , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.UNIT_CD , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.GR_QT AS SUM_GR_QT , IVDT.INV_QT , GRDT.GR_QT , GRDT.GR_APP_QT , POHD.CUR , IVDT.UNIT_PRC AS GR_UNIT_PRICE , GRDT.GR_ITEM_AMT , PODT.DUE_DATE , IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE , GRDT.GR_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(GRDT.GATE_CD, GRDT.GR_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS GR_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(GRDT.GATE_CD, GRDT.GR_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS GR_USER_TYPE , GRDT.GR_DATE , GRDT.GR_NUM , GRDT.GR_SQ , IVGH.REJECT_DATE , IVGH.REJECT_RMK , '' AS AP_REQ_YN , PODT.PR_NUM , PODT.PR_SQ , PODT.CONT_NUM , PODT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND GRDT.INV_SQ = IVDT.INV_SQ AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD= POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR PODT.PR_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND TO_NUMBER(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD) = '300'
AND GRDT.GR_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND GRDT.GR_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(GRDT.GR_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{GR_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(GRDT.GR_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{GR_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(GRDT.GATE_CD, GRDT.GR_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{GR_USER_NM}) '%'
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND (UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(POHD.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND (UPPER(REPLACE(PODT.ITEM_DESC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ITEM_DESC}, ' ', '')) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(PODT.ITEM_SPEC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ITEM_DESC}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(PODT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVGH.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
ORDER BY GRDT.GR_NUM DESC, GRDT.GR_SQ
